description: Style NoteImprove comfort and style with this spaghetti top from femella. The soft fabric will keep you comfortable all day long. Pair it with jeans or a skirt, a stylish T-shirt and sandals for that perfect girly look.Product DetailsBeige tank top, has adjustable fabric shoulder strapsMaterial and CareBlended fabricWash with like coloursDo not bleach or wringUse warm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8 and chest 33") is wearing a size M
